title: Transaction sending for Allora SDK (build/sign/simulate/broadcast/confirm)
description: Add proper transaction-sending to allora-sdk-go on top of the colleague's rigorous Wallet + Privy RemoteSigner branch (tani/ENGN-8456). Build on the ROOT-LEVEL draft (tx.go/tx_builder.go/signer.go/wallet.go/remote_signer.go), NOT the untracked tx/ package (older, sloppier, duplicates the signer abstraction + re-registers its own codec + spins a raw CometBFT client per broadcast). Reuse the existing rigorous pooled query infra: broadcast/simulate/gettx via cosmosrpc.ClientPool.Tx() (gen interfaces.TxClient, health-tracked + retried via pool.ClientPoolManager, go-utils/errors wrapping, config.CallOpt). Query account number/sequence via .Auth().Account. Keep alloracodec.CosmosCodec() as the single codec. Interface-package discipline throughout: contract in parent, impls in subpkg, static var _ Iface = (*impl)(nil) checks, NopXxx for optional deps, ctx through every I/O boundary, errors wrapped with go-utils/errors, panic on invariant violations. ENV: repo pins go 1.25.1 via .mise.toml; use the mise toolchain (ambient shell go is 1.26.x and will fail to build).
